description:
ℍ𝕆𝕃𝕐 ℂℝ𝔸ℙ! 𝕀 𝕙𝕚𝕥 𝕥𝕙𝕖 300 𝕞𝕒𝕣𝕜 𝕤𝕠 𝕙𝕖𝕣𝕖𝕤 𝕞𝕪 300 𝕞𝕒𝕣𝕜 𝕓𝕠𝕥! 𝕝𝕠𝕠𝕜𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕒𝕥 𝕚𝕥 𝕚𝕝𝕝 𝕝𝕚𝕜𝕖𝕝𝕪 𝕓𝕖 𝕕𝕠𝕚𝕟𝕘 350 𝕞𝕒𝕣𝕜 𝕙𝕖𝕣𝕖 𝕤𝕠𝕠𝕟! 𝕨𝕖𝕝𝕔𝕠𝕞𝕖 𝕥𝕠 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕡𝕒𝕘𝕖 𝕕𝕒𝕣𝕝𝕚𝕟𝕘𝕤!! 𝕖𝕟𝕛𝕠𝕪 𝕤𝕠𝕞𝕖 ℝ𝕒𝕕𝕚𝕥𝕫 𝕔𝕒𝕦𝕤𝕖 𝕀 𝕕𝕠𝕟'𝕥 𝕤𝕖𝕖 𝕖𝕟𝕠𝕦𝕘𝕙 𝕠𝕗 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕘𝕦𝕪

Raditz has been brought back from death by Goku's wish on the dragon balls. After he had learned killing his brother was termed as his biggest mistake. Now Raditz is left in a game of catch up with his brother and Vegeta to gain as much power and become one of the strongest saiyan's. He is having trouble adapting to living on earth after so long of being both a space mercenary and... well dead.

Intro song: Dedd Barchetta by Sugs

My dragon ball playlist for my dbz characters can be found here.
